title: FPS Deluxe
description: A Modpack that aims to mainly improve performance and on the other side give players all sorts of tweaks and quality of life changes.
body:
This pack mostly aims to optimize your Minecraft client and uses alot of mods for that purpose, but still adds a few quality of life features and tweaks that make your game feel clean and makes it easy to use. This modpack is also very fun to tinker with in the settings to make it more optimized for your goals :].

- Things to know about the modpack:
  - It uses alot of mods and is there by not a very lightweight pack
  - It includes litematica, tweakeroo and some other mods which on some servers might be      
    bannable, always check the allowed mods first before using this pack!
  - Performance depends on your hardware (,but that you might already know)

- Tips for making the pack more performant:
  - Increasing the allocated ram to atleast 4-8 gb for maxed out use of the pack
  - Changing ingame setting in the graphical section

Have fun.
